test.query: SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Encode(randomString(32)))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Encode(randomString(64)))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Decode(base58Encode(randomString(33))))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Decode(base58Encode(randomString(32))))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Decode(base58Encode(randomString(65))))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Decode(base58Encode(randomString(64))))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Decode(base58Encode(randomString(32)), 32))
SELECT count() FROM numbers(500000) WHERE NOT ignore(base58Decode(base58Encode(randomString(64)), 64))
